creator: leres@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 162176
patch

When I created the security/broccoli port I gave it the version number of the bro distribution it was packaged with. In retrospect, this was a mistake. We want to track the version of broccoli packaged with bro but the port should reflect the broccoli version number.

This PR upgrades broccoli from the version that was packaged with bro 2.3.2 (1.96) to the version that is packaged with bro 2.4.1 (1.97) and changed the port to use the broccoli version number.
